basic_details.job_title: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years of age who have MBBS, Delhi Medical Council (DMC) Registration, and Compulsory Rotatory Internship qualification are eligible to apply for these Junior Resident vacancies. The walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 will be held on 14 May 2026, and the vacancies are likely to remain up to 31 May 2026. Candidates can downloa

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 5 years extra for PWD; upper age limit relaxable up to 40 years under certain conditions.

qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Registered or applied for registration with Delhi Medical Council (DMC). Completed compulsory rotatory internship on or after 14-05-2024.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56100-177500/- (Pay Matrix Level 10, 7th CPC) Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident posts at SGMH Delhi is scheduled for 14th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Residents at SGMH Delhi?
faq.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) has announced a total of 10 vacancies for the Junior Resident positions. This is a good opportunity for eligible candidates to secure a government job.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Junior Resident post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree, be registered or have applied for registration with the Delhi Medical Council (DMC), and have completed their compulsory rotatory internship on or after 14th May 2024.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the SGMH Delhi Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the Junior Resident positions at SGMH Delhi. Candidates from all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST, are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident post will receive a salary in the pay matrix level 10 of the 7th CPC, ranging from Rs. 56100 to Rs. 177500 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How will the selection process be conducted for the Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident posts at SGMH Delhi will involve an Interview, followed by the preparation of a Merit List and Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Resident positions at SGMH Delhi is Ad-hoc. This means the appointment is temporary and for a specific period.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Junior Resident recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF should be consulted for the exact venue address for the walk-in interview. Candidates are advised to check the notification for precise details regarding the location.
